body.title: Implement remaining probe dispatchers — HABIT_DRYRUN, CHANNEL_SEND, SIM_TURN
body.result: 1af6eb1a — 3 new dispatchers (habit_dryrun, channel_send, sim_turn), all 6 ProbeKinds in SAFE_PROBE_KINDS + _DISPATCH. 8 new tests, 23 total scheduler tests pass.
body.description: Add dispatchers for the 3 ProbeKinds defined but not yet implemented. HABIT_DRYRUN: fire a habit in dry-run mode, observe whether it would succeed. CHANNEL_SEND: send a message and observe response. SIM_TURN: simulate a turn through the pipeline without committing. Add to SAFE_PROBE_KINDS and _DISPATCH after implementation.
